title: frangula californica
intro: Frangula californica, also known as California buckthorn or cascara sagrada, is a deciduous shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a laxative and stimulate bowel movements. The health benefits of Frangula californica include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to treat constipation, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues.
